story: Jen hides her longing for a child, sneaking on Fridays to a museum to sit before a marble Madonna. One week a wiry man notices her sadness and asks why. She admits, “Because I want a baby, and she has one.” He neither pities nor flees; he says, “If you think that baby’s great, wait till you see the size of the horse some soldier has in the next room,” and invites her along. As they walk past the transept, he decides he’ll ask if she wants to get a coffee at the museum café after they see the horse. They head toward the massive marble horse together.
implausible_knowledge: As they walk past the transept, he decides he’ll ask if she wants to get a coffee at the museum café after they see the horse.
question: After they finish looking at the marble horse, what will Jen most likely do?
answer_with_knowledge: Linger beside him by the horse, ready to accept his invitation to get coffee.
answer_without_knowledge: Thank him for showing her the statue.
